justification: The diff correctly updates Java version to 21 and migrates javax.* to jakarta.* across pom.xml and source files, while upgrading Spring to 6.x and Hibernate to 6.x. However, it does not leverage any Java 21-specific idioms (e.g., records, pattern matching, virtual threads), and retains older patterns like @RequestMapping replaced by @GetMapping/@PostMapping (which is good but not Java 21-specific). The migration is coherent with no spurious changes, but lacks Java 21 modernization beyond version bumping.
